detailed_description: This video spotlights an Omega-3 fish oil supplement by Prozis. It captures the process of opening the supplement bottle and pouring the golden softgels into a hand, showcasing the product's physical form. A detailed close-up highlights the label, emphasizing the health benefits of EPA & DHA for normal heart function and the product's premium quality. The video concludes by featuring the distinct appearance of the Omega-3 capsules, reinforcing its core offering.

segments.why_kept: This segment is the primary 'Hero Moment' as it directly demonstrates product interaction by showing the opening of the bottle and the main product (Omega-3 capsules) being poured out, clearly revealing its form and quantity. This is the core action of the video.

This segment provides crucial 'Key Information' from the product label, highlighting the health benefits and quality claims. It serves as a close-up 'Macro Detail' reinforcing the product's value proposition.

This segment offers a 'Macro Detail' shot of the product inside its container, allowing viewers to see the quantity and quality of the capsules clearly, acting as a supporting visual to the main reveal.
This segment provides an additional 'Product Interaction' by showing a hand delicately picking up the capsules, emphasizing ease of handling and presenting the product in a tactile manner.
